body:
help organize Democrats, hold Trump accountable, and show we're ready to fight | We need your help, friend -

**Begin Forwarded Message:**

Tomorrow is the day we've been dreading, team. Trump will officially become president, and the fight to defend our progress over the last eight years begins.

**We 're gearing up to fight Trump the MOMENT he takes office, but we need YOUR help.**

We set a $25,000 goal for our 2017 Trump Response Fund. Every dollar in this fund will help organize Democrats, hold Trump accountable, and show we're ready to fight. But, we only have until midnight Friday - twelve hours after Trump is sworn in - to hit this goal.

name: Donna Brazile
subject: Before Donald takes the oath...
body:
Let's get to work.
---
**Trump takes the Oath of Office today. Pitch in $10 or more to help Democrats fight back against his administration and Republicans in Congress, and we'll send you an Official 2017 Democratic Membership Card.

** **[GET YOUR CARD](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dccd/809793981/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+GET+YOUR+CARD&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2")**
Friend --

Donald Trump is about to be inaugurated as the 45th President of the United States.

I can't tell you how I'll feel when that moment comes -- only that I know it will be a very different experience than the joy and pride I felt when we saw Barack Obama take his Oath of Office eight years ago.

But one thing I do know is that the fear or anger we all might be feeling can be powerful motivators to speak out louder and fight back harder than we have before. **[And one thing you can do to make a difference today is pitch in $10 or more to become a card-carrying member of the Democratic Party.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcca/809793981/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+And+one+thing+you+can+do+to+make+a+diffe&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2")**

>From showing up to rallies to protect health care to calling your senators to maybe even thinking about running for office yourself, we're seeing a silver lining come through -- and it's that people like you are more committed than ever to making a difference in their communities and are fighting back against Trump and the GOP in real, meaningful ways. It's downright inspiring.

And it's what I'm going to think about when it would otherwise be so easy to feel scared or sorry for ourselves today. We still have work to do and so much left to fight for. Pitch in $10 or more today to help us do it (and we'll send you an Official Democratic Membership Card in the mail).

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dccb/809793981/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcc8/809793981/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcc9/809793981/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcd6/809793981/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcd7/809793981/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcd4/809793981/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2")
** Thanks for standing with us,

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcd5/809793981/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcd2/809793981/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcd3/809793981/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0a3/4067b0a/23e152c18/7e78dcd0/809793981/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170120_db_nd2&source=em_20170120_db_nd2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

subject: Peter, watch our campaign update from the first full week of session
body:
Peter,
The first full week of session is over and I wanted to
send you a campaign update from the road!

We are doing the people's business during the day and
early evening while keeping the campaign rolling at night.

Click the image below to watch my campaign update from
the first week of session.

We have a lot to accomplish for the Commonwealth of
Virginia during session, but that doesn't mean our campaign is on
hold.

Peter, please watch this campaign update from the first
week of session: https://youtu.be/yzTUqEFoHDk

While watching the video, subscribe to our YouTube
channel to keep up with all of our campaign videos.

Sincerely,

Delegate Glenn Davis

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Sign the petition: Betsy DeVos should not be secretary of education
body:
**[Senate Democrats: Betsy DeVos is not qualified to be secretary of education](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/6/vX/r5cs/6LH13p/GZvE85I3H)**
_The petition to Senate Democrats reads:_
**" Block and resist Betsy DeVos' confirmation as secretary of education."**
Add your name:
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/s/vX/r5cs/6LH13p/vafWVMRmWC)
---
Dear Activist,
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/v/vX/r5cs/6LH13p/d1zJBYaqH)
---
The reviews have been unanimous. **Betsy DeVos flunked her confirmation hearing** this week, making it even more clear that she's completely unqualified to run the Department of Education.
**More than 973,000 CREDO activists have joined you in signing our petition urging the Senate to reject DeVos, an extreme right-wing bigot who has no relevant experience as an educator and did not attend or send her children to public school.** The pushback from CREDO members has been amazing and has played a role in slowing down her confirmation process. But, our resistance is not done.
**We have to do everything we can to keep the U.S. Department of Education out of her unqualified hands.** Can you add your name today to keep the pressure on?
[Tell Senate Democrats: Block and resist Betsy DeVos' confirmation as secretary of education.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/z/vX/r5cs/6LH13p/vCnPxnbXZc)
DeVos is a right-wing voucher and charter school activist whose numerous projects include the disastrous effort to spread charters in Detroit, which failed to increase student achievement while allowing charters to operate with little accountability or oversight.1 She also has an appalling record on civil rights, which indicates she will be a threat to LGBTQ children, especially transgender students, who face prejudice, harassment and bullying in schools and suffer from higher rates of depression and suicide than non-LGBTQ classmates.
**Her confirmation hearing was an unmitigated disaster that showed even more clearly how unqualified she is to run the Department of Education.** Any senator who votes to confirm her will be supporting someone who:
> * Refused to commit to holding charter schools or private schools accepting federal vouchers as accountable as public schools;2
> * Refused to say she wouldn't privatize public schools or cut funds from public education;3
> * Failed to show basic understanding on a range of key issues, including how to assess student performance, how the Individuals With Disabilities Education Act works to protect the rights of students and how the Department of Education has worked to address campus sexual assault;4
> * Has no qualifications to manage the Department of Education's trillion dollar student loan bank;5
> * Told Sen. Chris Murphy, who represented Newtown, Connecticut when he was in the House of Representatives, that cities and states should be able to decide whether to allow guns in schools.6
>

**Equal access to high-quality education is one of the cornerstone promises of our democracy.** We have a long way to go and much work to do before it's a promise that is reliably and consistently fulfilled for children of color, children whose first language is not English and children living in poverty. **Putting Betsy DeVos at the helm of the Department of Education puts the promise itself at risk.**
Democrats must do everything they can to defend the Department of Education, starting with standing united against DeVos.
**[https://act.credoaction.com/sign/block_devos_dems/](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/U/vX/r5cs/6LH13p/6KVq2XYrdT)**
Thanks for everything you do.
Heidi Hess, Senior Campaign Director
[CREDO Action from Working Assets](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/j/R/r5cs/6LH13p/qNh6hx3LL)
Add your name:
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/5/vX/r5cs/6LH13p/zQRXMoJGun)
---
_References:_
1. Douglas N. Harris, "[Betsy DeVos and the Wrong Way to Fix Schools](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/r/vI/r5cs/6LH13p/zCqs5A0iFv)," The New York Times, Nov, 25, 2016.
2. Editorial Board, "[Betsy DeVos embarrassed herself and should be rejected by the Senate](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/Y/vA/r5cs/6LH13p/sAtML9nZ3G)," Los Angeles Times, Jan. 19, 2017.
3. Margaret Hartmann, "[6 Testy Moments From Trump Education Pick Betsy DeVos's Confirmation Hearing](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/e/v4/r5cs/6LH13p/s6qYjOAaZU)," New York Magazine, Jan. 18, 2017.
4. Ibid
5. Eugene Scott, "[Warren grills DeVos: 'I don't see how she can be the Secretary of Education'](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/3/vK/r5cs/6LH13p/vibnFi7vam)," CNN, Jan. 18, 2017.
6. Casey Quinlan, "[Betsy DeVos says guns in schools may be necessary to protect students from grizzly bears](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/zXdAT/W/vC/r5cs/6LH13p/vZucdr5aoC)," Think Progress, Jan. 17, 2017.

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTE3LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvNzE1NTU2MDg=)

body:
Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. |

Friend, I am humbled to write to you for the first time as your president. This is an honor I will never take lightly – and I will NEVER forget the brave and strong Americans who entrusted me with this great responsibility. Today, the world witnessed a free people reclaim their independence and take their country back. And it was all thanks to your support and winning attitude, Friend. Ronna McDaniel – our Party’s terrific new chairman and a real winner – will soon be sending me a list of our many members who renewed their commitment for the 2017 year. Friend: I hope you will accept your Sustaining Membership to sustain everything we accomplished for years and years to come. Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year and make a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. I am ready to work for you, I am ready to fight for you, and together, we will Make America Great Again! God bless you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States ----- FORWARDED MESSAGE ------- Friend, Tomorrow, you get the honor of seeing your work, your sacrifices, and your perseverance pay off. And I will be humbled to stand at President Trump’s side as the newly elected Chair of our Party. But I will also remember that we never could’ve done it without the grassroots of our Party. Thanks to your courage, the forgotten men and women will once again have a voice in our country. Before this great moment in our country’s history, I want to show our next president how many supporters have renewed their commitment for the 2017 year by becoming Sustaining Members. Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year by making a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. We didn’t win this election by relying on a few big donors and special interests. We won because millions of hardworking Americans chipped in whatever they could to save our country. Millions of Americans giving $10, $15, $25, $60 proved to be stronger and far more powerful than a handful of special interests trying to buy the election. You helped show the world that when the American people band together, nothing can stop us. But now is not the time to stop fighting. Just because we won an election doesn’t mean our job is done. As your next chairman, I will fight to sustain everything we achieved in 2016, and set us up for an even bigger 2018 and 2020. I will fight back when the media distorts our message and deceives the American people. I will fight to ensure we have the best data, the best messaging, and the best ground game. But I can’t do it alone. It won’t happen unless the grassroots of our Party once again step up and lead that unity. I am compiling a list for our next president of all those grassroots supporters who have renewed their commitment for the 2017 year as Sustaining Members, and I’d be humbled to add your name. Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year by making a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. Thank you, Chairman Ronna McDaniel Republican National Committee

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd32/2a380d31/142e35ba/fedaf6/3294010266/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd32/2a380d31/142e35ba/fedaf6/3294010266/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Hello --
Senator Maggie Hassan was sworn in less than three weeks ago, and she has been fighting for Granite Staters ever since.
Since Maggie is representing our state, we wanted to make sure you had a chance to see what she's been up to.
During Tuesday's confirmation hearing, Senator Hassan questioned Trump's Secretary of Education pick, billionaire Betsy Devos, on her commitment to protecting students who experience disabilities. [**In this clip, under questioning from Senator Hassan, Mrs. DeVos admits that she was confused about whether the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act was a federal law:**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd32/2a380d31/142e35ba/fedaf7/3294010266/VEsF/ "https://www.bostonglobe.com/news/politics/2017/01/18/devos-unfamiliarity-with-civil-rights-law-for-students-with-disabilities-concerns-hassan/eaRGm1bAzUy9PG2RCl5Q8M/story.html")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd32/2a380d31/142e35ba/fedaf7/3294010266/VEsC/ "https://www.bostonglobe.com/news/politics/2017/01/18/devos-unfamiliarity-with-civil-rights-law-for-students-with-disabilities-concerns-hassan/eaRGm1bAzUy9PG2RCl5Q8M/story.html")
**[Here, Senator Hassan presses Tom Price, Trump's choice for Secretary of Health and Human Services, on women's health.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd32/2a380d31/142e35ba/fedaf0/3294010266/VEsD/ "http://www.huffingtonpost.com/entry/tom-price-women-fired-reproductive-rights_us_587fca54e4b00d44838ca8a5") **He refused to answer for a vote he took against a measure to protect women from being fired for using birth control, being pregnant and unmarried, or for other decisions she makes about her own health:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd32/2a380d31/142e35ba/fedaf0/3294010266/VEsA/ "http://www.huffingtonpost.com/entry/tom-price-women-fired-reproductive-rights_us_587fca54e4b00d44838ca8a5")
Thanks to you, Maggie is on the front lines defending the basic principles that already make American great.
She's fighting to protect everyone's right to a good education, to make his or her own reproductive health choices, and to be fully included in our society.
We hope that she's making you proud.
-- Team Maggie

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Inauguration Day 2013
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

Four years ago on this date, I had just been elected to my first term in Congress. I stood in the cold Washington weather and proudly watched President Obama get inaugurated for the second, and final, time.

I was excited about the county's future, and eager to get to work for the people of Florida. I listened as President Obama addressed a nation slowly but gradually recovering from the depths of the recession, offering words of inclusion and hope to the hundreds of thousands gathered.

Four years later, a rocky transition of power and some of the most extreme and unqualified cabinet picks make me nervous about what may come next.

No matter what path the incoming administration takes, I plan to keep fighting for an environment that is protected for future generations, comprehensive immigration reform, a more equitable criminal justice system, and an economy that is fairer for everyone.

I am skeptical that President Trump will be able to set aside the battles and grievances of the campaign once and for all, and focus on the things that could bring us together as a country. But this nation has survived through Presidents popular and not, through periods of war and periods of peace, through prosperity and depression, and through times when voters have had a strong desire for change - even if it is not the change I would have ever envisioned.

Our challenge now is to keep that hope from Inauguration Day 2013 alive for a little while longer.

\-- Patrick |

subject: Sending a powerful message to Donald Trump
body:
We have an opportunity to send a powerful message to Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress:
#
_"Mr. Trump and his friends should know that there are millions of people who will not stand for their greed at the expense of the working class."_ \- Bernie Sanders
Sisters and Brothers -
Today is not the day any of us hoped to see. Not by a longshot. But it can be the day that all of us proclaim with one voice that we are going to resist any efforts to deny 30 million Americans health care.
It can be the day that we declare that we are going to stand with our brothers and sisters who are staring at the threat of mass deportation. That we will not let anyone divide us up by race, nationality, gender, or sexual orientation.
Together we have built the largest progressive grassroots movement this country has ever seen. And right now, we have an opportunity to send a powerful message to Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress: we are not going to let them drag us backward.
But that will only happen if we continue to stand together and fight:
[**Please make a $3 contribution to Our Revolution today as a way of saying that you will never stop fighting for the progressive values that powered Bernie 's presidential campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-inauguration?refcode=em170120-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-inauguration?refcode=em170120-full")
Like Bernie says, "we will lose our fights for justice when we are divided or apathetic, and the fights coming this year are too important to risk that."
Thank you for stepping up to continue the political revolution.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Our Revolution

President Trump and Congressional Republicans have a clear agenda for Trump's first 100 days: | Friend,

You and I know that a president's first 100 days is their best opportunity to push through top agenda items.

President Trump and Congressional Republicans have a clear agenda for Trump's first 100 days:
* Repealing the Affordable Care Act which has provided health care for tens of millions of Americans.
* Undoing all of President Obama's executive actions including those addressing climate change, protecting Dreamers, and safeguarding workers.
* Cutting and weakening common sense rules that protect consumers, public safety, and our environment.

We believe Americans want to move forwards, not backwards, but we want to hear from you, friend. | **Are you ready to fight for our shared values and stop Trump 's 100 day agenda? **

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: Introducing the Stop Trump Fund >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c710b/24c69fd9/fca5212f/18ee143d/32849236/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE125N_digital_email_20170120_Inauguration_n-all&source=WQEFE125N_digital_email_20170120_Inauguration_n-all")
---

Peter,

Donald Trump just took the oath of office to become the 45th President of the United States.

That's a hard sentence to write, and an even harder reality to grapple with.

We now have a president who is set on repealing Obamacare and ready to sign anti-choice legislation into law. We don't know all President Trump and his fellow Republicans have planned, but one thing is clear: the consequences of this presidency will be felt far and wide.

We have to stand together now more than ever before.

**[Donate $3 today to our Stop Trump Fund to fight back together against attacks on choice, women, and families.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c710b/24c69fd9/fca5212f/18ee143e/32849236/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170120_email_Inauguration?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+today+to+our+Stop+Trump+Fund+to&utm_campaign=WQEFE125N_digital_email_20170120_Inauguration_n-all&source=WQEFE125N_digital_email_20170120_Inauguration_n-all")**

We have fought too long and hard to let all of our progress be destroyed by Trump and his allies.

We're not going to return to an era of back alley abortions, we won't let Republicans dismantle Obamacare which has helped 20 million Americans get health insurance, and we sure as hell won't let them dictate whether women have access to the health care they need.

Today, we need to renew our vow to fight for progress. And with risks this high, sitting on the sidelines is simply not an option.

**Donate $3 today to the Stop Trump Fund to fight back:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Stop-Trump-Fund](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c710b/24c69fd9/fca5212f/18ee143f/32849236/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170120_email_Inauguration?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStopTrumpFund&utm_campaign=WQEFE125N_digital_email_20170120_Inauguration_n-all&source=WQEFE125N_digital_email_20170120_Inauguration_n-all")**

Thanks,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

body:
Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. |

Friend, I am humbled to write to you for the first time as your president. This is an honor I will never take lightly – and I will NEVER forget the brave and strong Americans who entrusted me with this great responsibility. Today, the world witnessed a free people reclaim their independence and take their country back. And it was all thanks to your support and winning attitude, Friend. Ronna McDaniel – our Party’s terrific new chairman and a real winner – will soon be sending me a list of our many members who renewed their commitment for the 2017 year. Friend: I hope you will accept your Sustaining Membership to sustain everything we accomplished for years and years to come. Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year and make a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. I am ready to work for you, I am ready to fight for you, and together, we will Make America Great Again! God bless you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States ----- FORWARDED MESSAGE ------- Friend, Tomorrow, you get the honor of seeing your work, your sacrifices, and your perseverance pay off. And I will be humbled to stand at President Trump’s side as the newly elected Chair of our Party. But I will also remember that we never could’ve done it without the grassroots of our Party. Thanks to your courage, the forgotten men and women will once again have a voice in our country. Before this great moment in our country’s history, I want to show our next president how many supporters have renewed their commitment for the 2017 year by becoming Sustaining Members. Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year by making a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. We didn’t win this election by relying on a few big donors and special interests. We won because millions of hardworking Americans chipped in whatever they could to save our country. Millions of Americans giving $10, $15, $25, $60 proved to be stronger and far more powerful than a handful of special interests trying to buy the election. You helped show the world that when the American people band together, nothing can stop us. But now is not the time to stop fighting. Just because we won an election doesn’t mean our job is done. As your next chairman, I will fight to sustain everything we achieved in 2016, and set us up for an even bigger 2018 and 2020. I will fight back when the media distorts our message and deceives the American people. I will fight to ensure we have the best data, the best messaging, and the best ground game. But I can’t do it alone. It won’t happen unless the grassroots of our Party once again step up and lead that unity. I am compiling a list for our next president of all those grassroots supporters who have renewed their commitment for the 2017 year as Sustaining Members, and I’d be humbled to add your name. Please accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year by making a contribution of $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $25, or $15. Thank you, Chairman Ronna McDaniel Republican National Committee
ACCEPT MY MEMBERSHIP

It's official, Friend. Donald Trump has been sworn in as President and has the complete power of the Executive Branch in his hands, from command of the armed forces to the ability to rescind President Obama's progress via Executive Order.

Now he's walking into the Oval Office after promising to repeal Obamacare, reverse environmental protections, end gun free zones, build a wall on our southern border, deport families, and ban Muslims from entering our country.

**We don 't know what he'll focus on first, but it won't be good. That's why Democrats aren't wasting ANY time this Inauguration Day - launching a $150,000 grassroots goal to be fully prepared to respond no matter what he throws at us.**

**Friend, hitting our goal is the best way to get ahead of President Trump and his right-wing agenda. Will you pitch in ASAP to stand up for Americans everywhere and fight back?**

Stopping Trump is only possible if grassroots Democrats fully commit to protecting the progress we achieved under President Obama.
